tasks.title: Get your accounts set up
tasks.description: Confirm you can log in to email, the ticketing system, and the VPN. Report any access problems to your instructor.

tasks.title: Shadow a senior support engineer for one afternoon
tasks.description: Book a session with a senior engineer, observe how they handle live tickets, and note 3 things you learned.

tasks.title: Read the QA test plan for the current release
tasks.description: Read the test plan and come to the next 1:1 with two questions about it.
